query: What was the official voter turnout percentage in the March 2022 Johor state election?
answer: I've completed the research. **The official voter turnout in the March 2022 Johor state election was approximately 54.9% (precisely cited as 54.92%)** — a steep drop from the 82% turnout in 2018, driven by the standalone snap-election timing, an expanded electorate (Undi-18 + automatic registration raising registered voters from ~1.8M to ~2.6M), and COVID-19 pandemic disruptions.
